QF.id: VI Functions of DP Account Operations_3

question.text: How many Delivery Instruction Slips (DIS) must be issued to BSDA holders at the time of account opening?

answer.text: None — only electronic instructions are allowed

explanation.text: **The Logic:** At least two DIS shall be issued at the time of account opening for BSDA holders. **The Trap:** 'None' would be incorrect as even BSDA holders may need physical DIS for certain transactions. **Cross-Exam Context:** Series VII covers delivery instruction processing in the settlement context. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Two DIS provides a basic minimum for BSDA holders who may not use internet-based delivery instructions.
